arts.ttl: Manchester City v Inter: Champions League – live
arts.sum: Champions League updates from the 8pm BST kick-off Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | And email Scott Manchester City dip their toe into this new-fangled 36-club-strong Champions League pool. The 2023 winners take on the team they beat to finally claim the European crown, so allow a little pre-match time for some good old reminiscing. Then it’s down to business, with City flying: the Community Shield already in the bag, four Premier League wins out of four, nine goals already for Erling Haaland. By comparison, the champions of Italy aren’t in such good form, with two wins and two draws to open their defence of Serie A, but Internazionale kept City honest last year in Istanbul and tonight they’ll no doubt do so again. Kick-off is at 8pm BST. It’s on! Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man City vs Inter team news LIVE!
arts.sum: Avoid defeat against Inter tonight, and Slovan Bratislava in early October, and City will equal the longest unbeaten streak in Champions League history (25). Inter head into tonight's game having only lost only three of their last 20 Champions League encounters, and out for revenge after losing to City in 2023's final...
